scripts.verify:swissarmypm: node scripts/run-with-temp-cleanup.mjs verify-swissarmypm "npm run build --workspace swissarmypm"
scripts.verify:swissarmypm:strict: node scripts/run-with-temp-cleanup.mjs verify-swissarmypm-strict "npm run type-check --workspace swissarmypm && npm run build --workspace swissarmypm"
scripts.verify:pmbrain: node scripts/run-with-temp-cleanup.mjs verify-pmbrain "npm run check --workspace pmbrain"
scripts.verify:workspace: node scripts/run-with-temp-cleanup.mjs verify-workspace "npm run verify:workflow && npm run build --workspace swissarmypm && npm run check --workspace pmbrain"
